completed_tasks.name: Fix Telethon authenticated proxy parsing and tdl proxy fallback
Harden IPK packaging, vendor proxy deps, and add iStore meta package
Install under /usr/lib with /opt symlink fallback for broken overlays
Change default download dir off /mnt tmpfs and document OpenWrt/iStoreOS guidance

decisions.decision: Ship one main IPK plus an optional app-meta package for iStore Installed list.
decisions.rationale: Avoid separate OpenWrt vs iStoreOS app builds while remaining compatible with plain OpenWrt.

decisions.decision: Install application files under /usr/lib/tg-downloader-ui and only create /opt symlink when writable.
decisions.rationale: Some iStoreOS Docker setups break /opt overlay visibility, which made opkg appear installed while app files were missing.
/mnt is frequently a tiny tmpfs until external storage is mounted and caused no-space download failures.

decisions.decision: Parse Telegram proxy URLs into Telethon dict form including username/password.
decisions.rationale: Authenticated HTTP proxies returned 407 when credentials were dropped from the proxy tuple.

next_action: Optional: rebuild release IPKs with python scripts/build_openwrt_ipk.py --output-dir dist/openwrt and push commits if publishing.
context_notes: Verified on iStoreOS 22.03.7 at 192.168.101.130. Telethon CONNECT_OK through authenticated proxy after proxy-dict fix. tdl 0.20.3 installed separately at /usr/bin/tdl. Package installs under /usr/lib/tg-downloader-ui. Large downloads may still see intermittent MTProto EOF through unstable proxies; current download path on the test VM is /media/tg-download on /dev/sda4. Do not delete Docker named volumes on fox@192.168.101.128 without approval.
